title: BEM-866 list real Claude workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
wfdir = Path('.github/workflows')
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_real_workflows')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
claude_count = 0
if wfdir.exists():
    for f in sorted(wfdir.glob('*')):
        if f.is_file():
            name = f.name
            text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')[:20000]
            low = (name + '\n' + text).lower()
            flags = []
            for token in ['claude', 'auditor', 'curator', 'workflow_dispatch', 'from_claude', 'anthropic', 'mailbox']:
                if token in low:
                    flags.append(token)
            safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in name)[:100]
            marker = outdir / (str(count).zfill(2) + '_' + safe + '.md')
            marker.write_text('# BEM-866 workflow file\nName: ' + name + '\nPath: ' + str(f) + '\nFlags: ' + ', '.join(flags) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
            changed_files.append(str(marker))
            count += 1
            if 'claude' in flags:
                claude_count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_REAL_WORKFLOWS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 real workflows index\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\nClaude-related: ' + str(claude_count) + '\nDirectory: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_real_workflows\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('listed real workflow files: ' + str(count) + ', claude-related: ' + str(claude_count))
"""
No issue comments.
